studyName: Integrated Genetic and Pharmacologic Interrogation of Rare Cancers

tables.description: This sample attributes table contains sample ID, sample type, tumor type, original material type, and analyte type.

variables.name: Original Material Type
variables.description: Original material source of where the nucleic acid was extracted from

variables.name: Sample Type
variables.description: Indicates the Tumor / Normal status of a sample

variables.name: Tumor Type
variables.description: Indicates tumor type of the studied sample

tables.description: This subject phenotype table contains subject ID,  gender, age, and primary disease state of patient.

variables.name: Gender
variables.description: Participant's gender as Male or Female

tables.description: This data table contains a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. The data table also includes sample use.

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Use of samples. Seq_DNA_SNP_MAF_Sum: Samples were used to generate aggregate mutation annotation file (.maf); Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing; Seq_RNA: Whole transcriptome sequencing

tables.description: The subject consent file includes subject IDs and consent information.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC
